feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: To trigger BAdI logic when only click 'Save' button in Purchase Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to control BAdI logic that write in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM to trigger when only click Save button in Purchase Order. Is there any condition to fulfill this request?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Generate ABAP repository Objects error - S/4HANA On Premise 2023
entry.content:
Hi Carrine/Team,

I am trying to develop GitHub RAP610 scenario in SAP S/4 HANA On premise 2023 system and creating objects in a package with software component version as ABAP on cloud. 

I created a DB table and then selected Generate ABAP Repository Objects option in ADT but its throwing an error - SAP object DDLS R_AONLINESHOP_VIC cannot be assigned to package ZCUSTOM_DEV_CLOUD

Please guide if this option works on S4 HANA on premise in Embedded Steampunk scenarios?? 

Please guide. 

 

Thanks,

Vivek

entry.title: How to add auto increase number custom field to Sales Order Header
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to add an auto increase numbering custom field with prefix value (eg. TEST-0000001, TEST-0000002, ...) in Sales Order header of s4hana cloud.

My current development is as following.

1. I added a custom field to Sales Order header screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modification of Header Custom Fields in Sales Documents (SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD) BAdI.

The logic is as following.

*set auto increase running no.

salesdocument_extension_out = salesdocument_extension_in.
DATA runningnum TYPE string.

IF salesdocument_extension_in-yy1_runningno_sdh IS INITIAL.
SELECT MAX( RunningNo ) FROM yy1_runningnumber INTO @DATA(current_max_id).
current_max_id = current_max_id + 1.

CONCATENATE 'TEST-' current_max_id INTO runningnum.
salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_runningno_sdh = runningnum.

* to save current increase number in Custom BO
CHECK cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

) = abap_true.

* Creation of the HTTP client to access the outbound service

* Replace the values for communication_scenario and outbound_service as required.

DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

).

* we get the csrf token to be able to make the POST call later

DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

DATA lv_s2 TYPE string VALUE '/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER?$top=1'.

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'X-CSRF-TOKEN' value = 'FETCH' ).

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).

request->set_method( 'GET' ).

TRY .

DATA(response) = lo_client->send( request ).

DATA(lv_csrf) = response->get_header_parameter( 'x-csrf-token' ).
DATA(lv_lenght) = response->get_header_parameter( 'content-length' ).

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_dealid_sdh = l_v_status.

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(l5).

data: lv_MSGV1(45) TYPE c,

lv_MSGV2(45) TYPE c.

lv_MSGV1 = l5->status_code.

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_csrf_sdh = lv_MSGV1.

lv_MSGV2 = l5->status_description.

ENDTRY.

DATA lv_json1 TYPE string VALUE '{"RunningNo":"'.

DATA lv_json2 TYPE string VALUE '"}'.

DATA lv_payload TYPE string.

CONCATENATE lv_json1 current_max_id lv_json2 INTO lv_payload.

*DATA: lv_payload TYPE string VALUE '{ "RunningNo": "10", "SalesOrder": "50" }'.

DATA(request1) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

*DATA lv_s1 TYPE string VALUE 'YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER'.

request1->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'x-csrf-token' value = lv_csrf ).

request1->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).

request1->set_method( 'POST' ).

request1->set_body( lv_payload ).

TRY .

DATA(response1) = lo_client->send( request1 ).

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx1).

ENDTRY.

ENDIF.

 

This logic works for increasing number.

But, the problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Sales Order screen without saving or with saving.

So, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Sales Order screen just for looking information.

 

So, I would like to ask some questions.

For In-App Extensibility,

1. Is there any condition that can control to trigger the BAdI logic when only I click 'Save' button?

2. Is there any build-in auto increase number function that can be used in any BAdI?

 

For Developer Extensibility,

1. Is it possible to add an auto increase number custom field using ADT?

If it is possible to do, could you please share some information or give guidelines.

 

If there is any unclear points in my question, please ask me details.

And also, if there is any workarounds that can be fulfilled this request, please give me some advices.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Two dependent Custom OVS in S4 hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 
 
I have created a custom BO with header level and item level
I want to add two OVS type custom fields in Manage Sales Order app. 
The first OVS field will show the header level data of custom BO that I have created. 
The second OVS field need to show the item level data of chosen header level data in first OVS field. 
It's like I want the dependent OVS fields.
 
Below is the way I have tried. 
Step 1 : Create a custom BO with header and item level. 
Step 2 : Create a Custom CDS view with the Value Help scenario type. In the elements tab, added the elements that I need and made key to both headerID and itemID
Step 3 : Create Custom field with the "Code List based on CDS View" type using the custom CDS view created in Step3. 
Step 4 : Add the custom field to "Manage Sales Order" app. 
 
The result  : 1. Both OVS fields showed all header and item level fields. 
         
Header Level OVS   
 
Item Level OVS 
2. I need to clear the filter value in header OVS field if I want to choose second time.
 
Filter value added when choose the value in header OVS
What I want : Header OVS need to show only the header level fields and item OVS need to show only the item level fields. I don't want to clear the filter value and the OVS field should be able to choose as much as I want. If the chosen header ID is changed, the value in item OVS should also change.

Header OVS I need:
Item OVS I need: The info is shown based on the chosen data in header OVS
 
Does anyone done like that development in S4 hana using Key User Extensibility.
Could you please provide the documentation or any idea?
 
If we cannot do using Key User Extensibility, is there a way we can do via Eclipse using developer extensibility. 

If there is any unclear points in my question, please feel free to ask me details.

And also, if there is any workarounds that can be fulfilled this request, please give me some advices.

 
Thanks in advance.
 
Best Regards, 
Pyae

entry.title: How to add extension field from developer extensibility?
entry.content: I would like to add extension field in Purchase Order from developer extensibility. When I try to add custom field in standard bo, error occurs as below. Is there any steps to add extension fields from developer extensibility?

entry.title: Issue with Using Gateway OData V4 Services in Custom ABAP Deployment Problem
entry.content:
I'm facing a challenge while deploying a Gateway OData V4 service in a custom ABAP environment. Here's a summary of the problem:

Upon creating an archive containing the SAPUI5 UI build result, I initiated the deployment process. However, the deployment failed with a 400 status code. The error message suggests that the SAPUI5 application wasn't successfully uploaded or registered due to the usage of unauthorized services for ABAP Key Users. Specifically, the utilization of the Gateway OData V4 service "SRVD C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD 0001" is not permitted.

I'd appreciate any assistance or insights on resolving this issue or any additional information on troubleshooting this error.

 

info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Creating archive with UI5 build result.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Archive created.

info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Starting to deploy.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST YY1_TEST found on target system: false
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Request failed with status code 400
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST SAPUI5 application YY1_TEST was not uploaded or registered successfully
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST SAPUI5 application YY1_TEST was not uploaded or registered successfully
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Please copy/paste this URL in a browser for more details:
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST (Note: You will need to replace the host in the URL with the internal host, if your destination is configured using an On-Premise SAP Cloud Connector)
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST https://my402136-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FUI5%2FUI5_REP_LOAD',MSGNO='003',MESSAGE_V1='YY1_TEST',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST ***** Upload of SAPUI5 App or Library from ZIP-Archive into SAPUI5 ABAP Repository *****
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Running in regular mode, brief log
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST 10 Files found in Archive.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST * Parameters *
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Operation parameters may have been adjusted.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The name of the SAPUI5 repository "YY1_TEST" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The binary files are identified using the standard settings.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The text files are identified using the standard settings.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The files and folders to be ignored are determined from the built-in standard settings.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The description of the SAPUI5 repository has been determined from the corresponding import parameter.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The package of the SAPUI5 Application "$TMP" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The external Code Page Name "UTF8" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The acceptance of Unix style end of line markers in text files has been determined from the corresponding import parameter.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Unix style end of line markers in text files get accepted.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The delta mode has been turned on.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Running in safe mode
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Upload canceled: Errors have been detected.
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The app uses not permitted services for ABAP for Key Users
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Please copy/paste this URL in a browser for more details:
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST (Note: You will need to replace the host in the URL with the internal host, if your destination is configured using an On-Premise SAP Cloud Connector)
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST https://my402136-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FUI5%2FREPO_USAGE',MSGNO='015',MESSAGE_V1='',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST The use of Gateway OData V4 Service SRVD C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD 0001 is not permitted.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Please copy/paste this URL in a browser for more details:
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST (Note: You will need to replace the host in the URL with the internal host, if your destination is configured using an On-Premise SAP Cloud Connector)
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST https://my402136-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='LA',MSGNO='005',MESSAGE_V1='Gateway%20OData%20V4%20Service',MESSAGE_V2='SRVD%20C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD%200001',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST SAPUI5 application YY1_TEST was not uploaded or registered successfully
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Please copy/paste this URL in a browser for more details:
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST (Note: You will need to replace the host in the URL with the internal host, if your destination is configured using an On-Premise SAP Cloud Connector)
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST https://my402136-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FUI5%2FUI5_REP_LOAD',MSGNO='003',MESSAGE_V1='YY1_TEST',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST
info abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST * Done *
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST SAP_Transaction: For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST SAP_Note: See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Deployment has failed.
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST Change logging level to debug your issue
error abap-deploy-task YY1_TEST (see examples https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/tree/main/packages/deploy-tooling#configuration-with-logging-enabled)
error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Request failed with status code 400
Command deploy failed with error Request failed with status code 400

entry.title: Communication Arrangement Check Connection Failed
entry.content:
Hello, 

 I am following the tutorial  to read values from On premise system into ABAP Cloud.    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-env-rfc.html

At the Step 8 Create Communication Arrangement . when i click on the Check connection. I am getting the message as The ping of the outbound service has failed.

1. In the Communication Systems --> General --> Host Name is same as the hostname that comes up in the browser when i run the transaction /ui2/flp  

 

2.  The Target Host Is same as the Destination Configuration -> URL < Host Name >

3. I checked the user credentials in the on premise system and the user credentials provided in Communication Systems --> Users for Outbound Communication  are the same. The same credentials are used in Cloud Connector also.   

4. When I Check the connection from Communication Arrangement . I am getting the error saying The ping of the outbound service has failed. In the error log it says the issue is in the service APS_COM_CA2_SRV .

Please help me resolve this issue. Also, Is there any better approach to connect to on premises S4HANA system . Thanks for your time and help.

entry.title: Custom Business Object as data source for Value Help of standard field
entry.content:
Dear team,

Is there a way how to make/change a value help for standard S4HC field from Custom Business Object?

Thank You.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Conditional formatting in multidimensional data grid apps
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

i am wondering if it is possible to color-format cells in a multidimensional data grid app based on a certain condition (e.g. if value > 0, color red).

Here a screenshot of my report: 

as described above, I would like the column "No. Rem./Expediters" to trun red if the value greater than 0. 

I would kindly appreciate if you could point me to the right documentation or have a hint on how to achieve this.

Thank you and Best regards 
Matthias

entry.title: CDS View for Check Clearing Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts.

I have created a customized payment report in Custom CDS Views in sap public cloud. And i my report i need "Check Clearing Date".

In which CDS View can i get the "Check Clearing Date" field in SAP Public Cloud?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: CDS View for Check Clearing Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts.

I have created a customized payment report in Custom CDS Views in sap public cloud. And i my report i need "Check Clearing Date".

In which CDS View can i get the "Check Clearing Date" field in SAP Public Cloud?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: BAdI that work custom field logic only click 'Save' button in Purchase Order
entry.content: I write custom field logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM. It trigger everytime I click something in Purchase Order. I would like to control that BAdI logic to trigger when only click Save button in Purchase Order. Is it possible or is there any other BAdI of purchase order to fulfill this request?

entry.title: SAP Fiori UI Adaptation: Hide 'Standard' View
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using UI Adaptation to hide certain fields in a standard Fiori app. What we would like to do is hide a few fields in a smart table object. As seen in the screenshot below, we have created a 'Custom' view for the Roles table by hiding certain fields. But when the app loads with this new UI variant, the user is still able to select the 'Standard' view for the Roles table and see All the fields, even those that were hidden in the Custom view. How do we prevent the user from selecting the Standard view such that only the Custom view is selectable/displayed?

I'm pretty sure this must be a common requirement - hiding fields in tables/line items?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: In Fiori MyInbox, where can we see the 'Deadline Messages' similar to Business Workplace
entry.content:
Hello All,
How can we see the 'deadline messages' in Fiori MyInbox application (App ID F0862).

Currently I am able to see the following filters in the fiori app:

 

Filter By

 - Priority
 - Due On
 - Status
 - Created On
 - My Tasks and Tasks on Behalf Of
 - Task Type

 

Is it possible to add a new Filter,maybe via Flexible workflows?
Do I need to enhance the standard app in BAS to add a new Filter?
Do we also need to enhance its corresponding backend class?

entry.title: The Sales Order Confirmation PDF Output lack the customer name field
entry.content:
Hi,

In APP Maintain Form Templates , I copy the Form Template SD_SLS_ORDER_CONFIRM, and create a new Form Template.

 

But I find that the customer name field is not in the data source 'FDP_V1_ORDER_CONFIRM_SRV'

I download the so XML ,and open it by LC Designer. I can find the customer field , but I can't find the customer name field.

 

How to get the customer name field in the sales order?

entry.title: using Number Range Object to get unique number in "Manage Sales Order" App of S4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to get unique number (auto increase number) custom field in Manage Sales Order App of S4hana cloud.

And I found "Manage Number Range Intervals" App.

But there is no Create or Add button in App.

1. Can it be possible to use Number Range Object to set new custom field of unique number (auto increase number) in Manage Sales Order app of S4hana cloud?

2. If No.1 is yes, Is there any possible way to create Number Range Object using this "Manage Number Range Intervals" or need to use other App?

3. Is there any way to call "Number Range Object created using ADT" from BAdI custom logic?

If you have any experience about this or any document about how to create Number Range Object in S4hana cloud, could you please share with me?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Trigger logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM BAdI
entry.content:
I would like to create auto increase number custom field in Manage Purchase Order app.

My current development steps are as following

1. I added a custom field to Purchase Order item screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI.

The problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Manage Purchase Order screen without saving or with saving. 

And, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Purchase Order screen just for looking information.

So, I would like to ask that

 in Manage Purchase Order app, is there any BAdI that will be trigger only when Save button is clicked (like Before Save event) and also custom field can be used ?

(Or)

 Is there any condition that can be added in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI to trigger only when Save button is clicked?

entry.title: Creating custom field (auto increase number) in Header of Manage Sales Order App S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to add a custom field in Header level of Sales Order.

The custom field must have prefix value and must be increase 1 whenever new Sales Order is created.

(eg. SO-00000001, SO-000000002,.....)

To get this kind of custom field,

could you please provide any workaround, idea or documentation? 

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
I want to Deploy my Fiori app to Sap S4hana Public Cloud, I stuck in problem when try to create a Fiori app on SAP BAS
I am Follow this tutorials on SAP Developers, 

 Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials

I have done Step 2 and Step 3 

Communication system on SAP S4hana Cloud Side

 

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine 

My Problem:

I Think that there are any change in SAMLAssertion Authentication ? Because I have done this tutorial 5 months ago but now I'm facing the problem with same settings. The Error tell me that maybe my destination not works ? there are any setting that I'm missing

I'm waiting for yours solutions, 
Thanks

entry.title: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with Google Workspace
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

We have a requirement to integrate with Google Workspace. 

1. Let us know the whole process.

2. How do we access Google Console.

3. Need help with achieving this integration.

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
